mapper.select:
SELECT A.BUYER_CD , A.CONT_NUM , A.CONT_CNT , A.PR_BUYER_CD , A.PR_DEPT_CD , A.BUYER_NM , A.PR_BUYER_NM , A.PR_DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.PR_BUYER_CD, A.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , A.CONT_USER_ID , A.CONT_USER_NM , A.CONT_DESC , A.PROGRESS_CD ,GETCOMCODE(#{ses.gateCd},'M135', A.PROGRESS_CD ,'0' ,#{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_CD_NM , A.VENDOR_CD ,(CASE WHEN A.CONT_TYPE = '1120' THEN GETBUYERDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ELSE A.VENDOR_NM END) AS VENDOR_NM -- 위수탁계약서인 경우 협력사는 지역농축협(고객사) , A.CONT_TYPE , A.CONT_REQ_CD , A.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , A.FINISH_FLAG , A.BUNDLE_NUM , A.SIGN_STATUS ,(A.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE ,(A.ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE ,(A.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_START_DATE ,(A.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_END_DATE , A.CUR , A.CONT_AMT , A.VAT_TYPE ,(A.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS SEND_DATE ,(A.CONT_CLOSE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_CLOSE_DATE , A.CONT_CLOSE_RMK ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , A.ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VENDOR_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.STAMP_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS STAMP_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.STAMP_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.CERT_TYPE , A.S_SIGN_DATE , A.S_SIGN_ID , A.S_SING_NM , A.B_SIGN_DATE , A.B_SIGN_ID , A.B_SING_NM , A.GUAR_CNT , A.DI_GUAR_CNT , A.ADV_GUAR_CNT , A.WARR_GUAR_CNT , A.FORM_NM , A.FORM_FILE_NM , A.SUB_FORM_FILE_NM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND UUID = A.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PDF_ATT_FILE_CNT , A.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , A.VENDOR_DEPT_CD , A.ERP_SEND ,(CASE WHEN A.VENDOR_SEND_FLAG = '1' THEN '1' ELSE null END) AS VENDOR_SEND_FLAG , A.IF_TYPE , A.SIGN_PATH_NM , A.IF_YN FROM (SELECT CT.GATE_CD , CT.BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(CT.GATE_CD, CT.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , CT.CONT_NUM , CT.CONT_CNT , CT.CONT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(CT.GATE_CD, CT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_USER_NM , CT.CONT_DESC , CT.PROGRESS_CD , CT.CONT_REQ_CD -- M134 , CASE WHEN CT.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE CT.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG END AS AUTO_RENEW_FLAG -- M044 , CASE WHEN SYSDATE > CT.CONT_END_DATE THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS FINISH_FLAG , CT.BUNDLE_NUM , CT.SIGN_STATUS -- M020 , CT.CONT_DATE , CT.ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE , CT.CONT_START_DATE , CT.CONT_END_DATE , CT.CUR -- M023 , CT.VAT_TYPE -- M100 , CT.SEND_DATE , CT.CONT_CLOSE_DATE , CT.CONT_CLOSE_RMK , CT.ATT_FILE_NUM , CT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM , CT.STAMP_ATT_FILE_NUM , CT.CERT_TYPE , SS.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.PR_BUYER_CD) AS PR_BUYER_NM , SS.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.PR_BUYER_CD, SS.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , SS.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , SS.CONT_AMT , ECCF.CONT_TYPE ,(SS.B_SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS B_SIGN_DATE , SS.B_SIGN_ID ,GETUSERNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.B_SIGN_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS B_SING_NM ,(SS.S_SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS S_SIGN_DATE , SS.S_SIGN_ID ,GETUSERNAME(SS.GATE_CD, SS.S_SIGN_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS S_SING_NM , CASE WHEN SS.GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN DENO_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END) ELSE SS.GUAR_CNT END AS GUAR_CNT , CASE WHEN SS.DI_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN DENO_DI_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END) ELSE SS.DI_GUAR_CNT END AS DI_GUAR_CNT , CASE WHEN SS.ADV_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN DENO_ADV_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END) ELSE SS.ADV_GUAR_CNT END AS ADV_GUAR_CNT , CASE WHEN SS.WARR_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN DENO_WARR_GUAR_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 0 END) ELSE SS.WARR_GUAR_CNT END AS WARR_GUAR_CNT , ECCF.FORM_NM , ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM , SS.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , SS.VENDOR_DEPT_CD ,(SELECT LISTAGG('' || ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY (ECCR.REL_FORM_SQ, ECRL.FORM_SQ), ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM) AS SUB_FORM_FILE_NM FROM STOCECRL ECRL JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECCR ECCR ON (ECCF.GATE_CD = ECCR.GATE_CD AND ECCF.FORM_NUM = ECCR.FORM_NUM AND ECRL.FORM_NUM = ECCR.REL_FORM_NUM AND ECCR.DEL_FLAG = '0') -- 2021.01.15 : 계약서폼 중복으로 인한 오류 수정 WHERE ECRL.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ > 0) AS SUB_FORM_FILE_NM ,(CT.ERP_SEND,'0') AS ERP_SEND , CT.VENDOR_SEND_FLAG ,(SELECT MAX(PRHD.IF_TYPE) FROM STOCECMT ECMT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND PRDT.PR_SQ = ECMT.PR_SQ AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND PRHD.IF_TYPE IS NOT NULL AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS IF_TYPE ,(SELECT LISTAGG(CVUR.USER_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY SCTP.SIGN_PATH_SQ) FROM STOCSCTP SCTP JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = SCTP.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = SCTP.SIGN_USER_ID) WHERE SCTP.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND SCTP.APP_DOC_NUM = CT.APP_DOC_NUM AND SCTP.APP_DOC_CNT = CT.APP_DOC_CNT AND SCTP.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SIGN_PATH_NM ,(CT.IF_YN, '0') AS IF_YN -- ITPortal I/F 여부(2021.07.16) FROM STOCECCT CT JOIN (SELECT ECCT.GATE_CD , ECCT.BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD ELSE ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD END) AS PR_BUYER_CD ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD ELSE ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD END) AS PR_DEPT_CD , ECCM.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PAY_AMT ELSE ECCM.CONT_AMT END) AS CONT_AMT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'CONT' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'DIF' AND ECPC.GUAR_AMT > 0 AND ECPC.ATT_FILE_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DI_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'ADV' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN IVAP.GUAR_TYPE = 'ADV' AND IVAP.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND IVAP.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ADV_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'WARR' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND ECPC.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN IVAP.GUAR_TYPE = 'WARR' AND IVAP.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 AND IVAP.GUAR_TYPE2 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WARR_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'CONT' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DENO_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'DIF' AND ECPC.GUAR_AMT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DENO_DI_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'ADV' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DENO_ADV_GUAR_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN ECPC.GUAR_TYPE = 'WARR' AND ECPC.GUAR_PERCENT > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DENO_WARR_GUAR_CNT , ECSVB.SIGN_DATE AS B_SIGN_DATE , ECSVB.SIGN_ID AS B_SIGN_ID , ECSVS.SIGN_DATE AS S_SIGN_DATE , ECSVS.SIGN_ID AS S_SIGN_ID ,(CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ELSE ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM END) AS PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM , NULL AS VENDOR_DEPT_CD FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECPC ECPC_M ON (ECPC_M.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECPC_M.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECPC_M.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECPC_M.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECPC_M.PR_BUYER_CD = ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC_M.PR_DEPT_CD = ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC_M.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC_M.PAY_CNT = '0' AND ECPC_M.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECPC ECPC ON (ECPC.GATE_CD = ECPC_M.GATE_CD AND ECPC.BUYER_CD = ECPC_M.BUYER_CD AND ECPC.CONT_NUM = ECPC_M.CONT_NUM AND ECPC.CONT_CNT = ECPC_M.CONT_CNT AND ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD = ECPC_M.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD = ECPC_M.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECPC.VENDOR_CD = ECPC_M.VENDOR_CD AND ECPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON (IVAP.GATE_CD = ECPC.GATE_CD AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = ECPC.BUYER_CD AND IVAP.CONT_NUM = ECPC.CONT_NUM AND IVAP.CONT_CNT = ECPC.CONT_CNT AND IVAP.PR_BUYER_CD = ECPC.PR_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PR_DEPT_CD = ECPC.PR_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.VENDOR_CD = ECPC.VENDOR_CD AND IVAP.PAY_CNT = ECPC.PAY_CNT AND IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD = ECPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD = ECPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECSV ECSVB ON (ECSVB.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECSVB.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECSVB.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECSVB.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECSVB.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECSVB.SIGN_ID = (CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECPC_M.SIGN_ID ELSE (SELECT USER_ID FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND COMPANY_CD = ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AND USER_ID = ECSVB.SIGN_ID AND USER_TYPE = 'B') END) AND ECSVB.USER_TYPE = 'B') LEFT JOIN STOCECSV ECSVS ON (ECSVS.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECSVS.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECSVS.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECSVS.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECSVS.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECSVS.SIGN_ID = (CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN ECSVS.SIGN_ID ELSE (SELECT USER_ID FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND COMPANY_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND USER_ID = ECSVS.SIGN_ID AND USER_TYPE = 'B') END) AND ECSVS.USER_TYPE = (CASE WHEN ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM IS NULL THEN 'S' ELSE 'B' END)) WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ((ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd}) OR (ECCT.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND (#{ses.companyCd} IN (ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD))) ) AND (ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG IS NULL OR ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG != '1') -- 수기계약제외(내부관리용) AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND ECCT.CONT_DATE >= (#{REG_DATE_FROM}) AND ECCT.CONT_DATE <= (#{REG_DATE_TO})
AND ECCT.CONT_END_DATE >= (#{REG_DATE_FROM}) AND ECCT.CONT_END_DATE <= (#{REG_DATE_TO})
AND ((UPPER(ECCT.CONT_DESC) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%') OR (ECCT.CONT_NUM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%') OR (ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%') )
AND ((ECCT.CONT_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_ID}) '%') OR (ECPC_M.PY_USER_ID LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_ID}) '%') )
AND ((UPPER(GETUSERNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETUSERNAME(ECPC_M.GATE_CD, ECPC_M.PY_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_NM}) '%') )
AND ECCT.PROGRESS_CD IN
#{item}
AND ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD = #{CONT_REQ_CD}
AND ((ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%') OR (ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%') )
AND ((UPPER(GETCUSTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETCUSTNAME(ECPC_M.GATE_CD, ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_NM}) '%') )
AND ((ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_CD}) '%') OR (ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_CD}) '%') )
AND ((UPPER(GETDEPTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETDEPTNAME(ECPC_M.GATE_CD, ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD, ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_NM}) '%') )
AND ECCM.VENDOR_CD LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND ((UPPER(GETVENDORNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%') OR (UPPER(GETCUSTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%') )
GROUP BY ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.BUYER_CD, ECCT.CONT_NUM, ECCT.CONT_CNT, ECCT.BUNDLE_NUM ,ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD, ECCM.CONT_AMT ,ECPC_M.PY_BUYER_CD, ECPC_M.PY_DEPT_CD, ECPC_M.VENDOR_CD, ECPC_M.PAY_AMT ,ECSVS.SIGN_DATE, ECSVS.SIGN_ID, ECSVB.SIGN_DATE, ECSVB.SIGN_ID ,ECCM.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM, ECCM.VENDOR_DEPT_CD, ECPC_M.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM ) SS ON (SS.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND SS.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND SS.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND SS.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT) JOIN STOCECRL ECRL ON (ECRL.GATE_CD = CT.GATE_CD AND ECRL.BUYER_CD = CT.BUYER_CD AND ECRL.CONT_NUM = CT.CONT_NUM AND ECRL.CONT_CNT = CT.CONT_CNT AND ECRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND ECRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (ECCF.GATE_CD = ECRL.GATE_CD AND ECCF.FORM_NUM = ECRL.FORM_NUM) WHERE 1 = 1 AND ECCF.CONT_TYPE IN ('1110', '1130', '1210')
AND UPPER(ECCF.FORM_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{FORM_NM}) '%'
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.FINISH_FLAG = #{FINISH_FLAG}
AND A.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG = #{AUTO_RENEW_FLAG}
AND A.IF_TYPE = #{IF_TYPE}
ORDER BY A.CONT_NUM DESC , A.CONT_CNT DESC
